subject: Re: tomorrow....
body:
work from home.. it's ok,, and too important

--- Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com> wrote:

> Hi Jeffrey.  Well, tomorrow is the day of my
> retrieval.  I can't believe
> it's here already.  I gave this alot of thought and
> in the end, I
> decided 30 years from now I didn't want to regret
> having not tried.  So
> I will need to be out all day tomorrow but will be
> fine to come to work
> on Thursday.  Monday Aug.21 is the implantation. 
> I'm supposed to 'take
> it easy' and not do alot of walking, so I was
> wondering if I could have
> Citicar or Jojo pick me up from Grand Central and
> bring me to the office
> next T, W, Th??
>  
>  
>  
>  
>  
>  
> Lesley Groff
> Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein

body_html:
work from home.. it's ok,, and too important

--- Lesley Groff lesley@nysgllc.com wrote:

Hi Jeffrey. Well, tomorrow is the day of my
retrieval. I can't believe
it's here already. I gave this alot of thought and
in the end, I
decided 30 years from now I didn't want to regret
having not tried. So
I will need to be out all day tomorrow but will be
fine to come to work
on Thursday. Monday Aug.21 is the implantation.
I'm supposed to 'take
it easy' and not do alot of walking, so I was
wondering if I could have
Citicar or Jojo pick me up from Grand Central and
bring me to the office
next T, W, Th??

Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
